title: tftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[5.2-50]
- tftp: propagate exit codes in non-interactive mode (RHEL-102114)

[5.2-49]
- fix creation of /var/lib/tftpboot in image mode (RHEL-79983)
full_text:
[5.2-50]
- tftp: propagate exit codes in non-interactive mode (RHEL-102114)

[5.2-49]
- fix creation of /var/lib/tftpboot in image mode (RHEL-79983)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20313-0.html
